response: To report a lost or stolen Visa card from India, you can call Visa at 000-800-100-1219. You can also visit the Visa Lost or Stolen card page at https://www.visa.com/support/consumer/lost-stolen-card.html for assistance.
justification: The user is asking for information on how to report a lost or stolen Visa card from India. The documentation provides a phone number and a link to a specific page for reporting lost or stolen cards.
